headline: The Stock Market’s Bottom Is Closer Than You Think
summary: While the  declined just 0.9% this week, it is officially in correction territory, as is the  which slumped 3.2%.  Not even an extension of President Donald Trump’s deadline to attack Iran’s power grid could help the market find support.  For one, Trump clearly wants to leave an opening for a deal. On Thursday, he said he was extending Iran’s deadline to open the Strait of Hormuz to April 6, from the March 27 deadline he had offered Monday.

headline: Dollar General (DG) Appoints Jerry Fleeman Jr. as CEO Effective January 2027
summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) is one of the 7 Heavily-Battered Consumer Stocks That Could Triple by 2027. headline: The Friday Checkout: Will Dollar General’s new CEO make it more of a grocery destination?
summary: With its appointment of a top Ahold Delhaize executive, the discounter is entrusting its future to a leader with decades of experience in the supermarket industry.

headline: Vinci’s New Contracts Deepen Role In Low Carbon And Fusion Projects
summary: Vinci (ENXTPA:DG) has secured contracts to upgrade river locks on the Rhône in France, supporting low carbon river transport. The group, via subsidiary Nuvia, also won a multi year contract for critical infrastructure on the UK's STEP fusion energy prototype project. These wins expand Vinci's role in European energy transition and next generation clean energy projects. Vinci, trading at around €127.1, is an established player in European concessions and construction. These contracts add...
